attendance_policy: Students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be eligible for exams.
exam_policy: Internal exams are held every month. End-semester exams are conducted by the university.
ragging_policy: Ragging in any form is strictly prohibited and punishable under university rules and Indian law.
hostel_policy: Hostel residents must return by 10:00 PM. Overnight leave requires written parental consent.
dress_code: Students must follow the prescribed dress code: formals on Monday and Friday, casual on other days.
mobile_policy: Mobile phones are not allowed in classrooms. Violation may result in confiscation.
scholarship: Merit scholarships are awarded to top 5% students each semester based on GPA.
grievance_redressal: Grievances can be submitted through the student portal or directly to the Grievance Cell in Admin Block Room 201.
